page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Pysam is a Python module for reading and manipulating SAM/BAM/VCF/BCF files. It's a lightweight wrapper of the htslib C-API, the same one that powers samtools, bcftools, and tabix.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Pysam is a python module for reading and manipulating Samfiles. It is a lightweight wrapper of the samtools C-API. Pysam also includes an interface for tabix.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A Python module for reading and manipulating SAM/BAM/VCF/BCF files.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A Python module for reading and manipulating SAM/BAM/VCF/BCF files.
